name: Trilium Notes
description: Build your personal knowledge base with Trilium Notes
compose:
name: slashnode-trilium-notes
services:
  server:
    image: triliumnext/trilium:v0.103.0
    container_name: trilium-notes
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      TRILIUM_DATA_DIR: /data
    volumes:
      - server_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3779:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-trilium-notes_server_data
